summary.what_built: This module creates a new endpoint that provides a hardcoded portfolio snapshot in JSON format.
summary.problem: It solves the need for a quick view of a portfolio's current state without additional features.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to the lack of error handling and reliance on hardcoded data, which may not reflect real-time changes.
summary.validation: The basic functionality of returning a JSON response was checked and passed.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new endpoint will be added to the Flask application, allowing access to the portfolio snapshot.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how this endpoint will perform under load or if it will integrate well with existing services.
